moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals: England in Action
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-finals are underway, with England facing Norway today for a place in the semi-finals.

angles.name: England's Big Match
angles.copy: It's a huge day for England as they battle Norway in the World Cup Quarter-Finals today! Can they book their spot in the semis?

angles.name: Quarter-Finals Heat Up
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup Quarter-Finals are delivering all the drama! France and Spain are already through, who joins them today?

moments.title: Wimbledon Men's Singles Final
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships conclude tomorrow, July 12th, with the highly anticipated Men's Singles Final at the All England Club.

angles.name: Centre Court Showdown
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The Wimbledon Men's Singles Final is tomorrow. Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Last Day of Wimbledon
angles.copy: Don't miss the final day of Wimbledon tomorrow! The grass court season culminates with the Men's Singles champion crowned.

moments.title: The 154th Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The Open Championship, golf's oldest major, tees off from July 16-19, 2026, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport.

angles.name: Golf's Major Moment
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is up for grabs! The 154th Open Championship begins next week at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for glory?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Hosts
angles.copy: Golf fans, get ready! Royal Birkdale hosts The Open Championship from Thursday. Expect drama on the links!

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival Live in London
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival is happening today, July 11th, at Alexandra Palace Park in London, featuring a diverse lineup of music and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Vibes
angles.copy: The sun is shining, the music is playing! Kaleidoscope Festival takes over Alexandra Palace Park today. Who's there?

angles.name: London's Festival Fun
angles.copy: Live music and good times today in London as Kaleidoscope Festival brings a lineup of acts to Ally Pally. Get involved!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival continues today and tomorrow, July 10-12, in Birmingham's Moseley Park.

angles.name: Birmingham's Groove
angles.copy: Birmingham is grooving! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is on all weekend in Moseley Park. Who's catching some smooth tunes?

angles.name: Festival Finale Tomorrow
angles.copy: Don't miss the final day of Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival tomorrow! Get your fix of incredible live music in Birmingham.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival begins on July 15th, bringing four days of traditional and contemporary music to Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland.

angles.name: Island Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides? The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off Wednesday with a fantastic lineup of music and culture!

angles.name: Scottish Sounds
angles.copy: Get ready for a celebration of Scottish music and culture! HebCelt starts next week in Stornoway.

moments.title: New BBC Comedy 'Ann Droid' Premieres
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the quirky new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', which premieres today, July 11th.

angles.name: Diane Morgan's New Show
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back! Catch her in the brand new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid' premiering tonight. Get ready for some laughs.

angles.name: New TV Alert
angles.copy: Looking for something new to watch tonight? 'Ann Droid' is the quirky new BBC comedy you didn't know you needed.

moments.title: ITV's 'The Dark' Thriller Starts
moments.blurb: The gripping new serial killer drama 'The Dark', set in the Scottish countryside, premieres on ITV and ITVX tomorrow, July 12th.

angles.name: Scottish Thriller
angles.copy: A moody new serial killer drama is coming! ITV's 'The Dark', set in the Scottish wilderness, starts tomorrow night.

angles.name: New Sunday Night Drama
angles.copy: Your Sunday night TV just got a lot more gripping! Don't miss the premiere of 'The Dark' tomorrow on ITV.

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: Season 2 of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix tomorrow, July 12th.

angles.name: Pods Reunion Drama
angles.copy: The 'Love is Blind: UK' drama isn't over! 'After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix tomorrow. What's happened since the pods?

angles.name: Netflix Binge Alert
angles.copy: Your Sunday binge is sorted! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 lands on Netflix tomorrow. Who are you catching up with?

moments.title: Happy 40th to Derek Sanders
moments.blurb: Derek Sanders, frontman of American rock band Mayday Parade, turns 40 today.

angles.name: Mayday Parade Frontman
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 40th birthday to Derek Sanders, the incredible voice of Mayday Parade! What's your favourite MP track?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt Turns 80
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rock, country, and pop icon Linda Ronstadt celebrates her 80th birthday on July 15th.

angles.name: Music Legend's Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 80th birthday on Wednesday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt! Her incredible voice defined eras. What's your favourite song?

moments.title: Olly Alexander Turns 35
moments.blurb: Years & Years frontman and Eurovision star Olly Alexander celebrates his 35th birthday on July 15th.

angles.name: Years & Years Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 35th birthday to the one and only Olly Alexander on Wednesday! What's your favourite Years & Years hit?

moments.title: Ray Toro Celebrates 49th
moments.blurb: My Chemical Romance guitarist and co-founder Ray Toro turns 49 on July 15th.

angles.name: MCR Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 49th birthday on Wednesday to My Chemical Romance's incredible guitarist, Ray Toro! What's your favourite MCR riff?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: Drummer and co-founder of The Police, Stewart Copeland, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Police Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to the iconic Stewart Copeland, drumming legend of The Police, on Thursday! What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Natasha Hamilton Turns 44
moments.blurb: Atomic Kitten singer Natasha Hamilton celebrates her 44th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Atomic Kitten Pop Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 44th birthday to Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton on Friday! What's your favourite AK memory?

moments.title: Geezer Butler Turns 77
moments.blurb: Black Sabbath bassist and lyricist Geezer Butler, a heavy metal pioneer, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Metal Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the legendary Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath on Friday! What's your favourite Sabbath track?

moments.title: Bristol Pride Parade Today
moments.blurb: Bristol Pride culminates today, July 11th, with the colourful Pride Parade through the city, celebrating the LGBTQIA+ community.

angles.name: Celebrating Pride in Bristol
angles.copy: Bristol is vibrant with colour today as the Pride Parade takes over the city! Celebrating love and equality for all.

angles.name: Pride Parade Energy
angles.copy: The energy is incredible at the Bristol Pride Parade today! Share your favourite moments from the celebrations.

moments.title: Bristol Harbour Festival Returns
moments.blurb: The free Bristol Harbour Festival brings a weekend of music, markets, and maritime fun to Bristol's historic harbourside from July 17-19.

angles.name: Harbourside Fun
angles.copy: Bristol Harbour Festival is back next weekend! Get ready for a free weekend of music, markets, and maritime magic.

angles.name: Summer in Bristol
angles.copy: Planning your weekend? Bristol Harbour Festival kicks off next Friday with something for everyone by the water!
